detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=1e-12. Effect: OR/Beta=0.154041 [0.11-0.2] unit decrease. Initial sample: 5,356 Icelandic ancestry individuals. Replication sample: NA.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.
riskSummary: COL18A1 risk allele is associated with Serum levels of protein COL18A1 (OR/Beta 0.154041 [0.11-0.2] unit decrease) in a large, replicated genome-wide study
notes: Generated from bulk GWAS Catalog data; effect size and ancestry transferability require review.
